creator: andreas@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

Hi, 
its basically an acroread bug. 
Acroread7 doesn't seem to run properly since a long time. 
If it still doesnt run, it should be marked as broken. 
Admins should deinstall it if it doesnt work. 
If Acroread7 is deinstalled then apsfilter uses automatically 
the other filter which you now want to enable by default. 

I personally would like that apsfilter will be "hacked" in this way 
since normally this order of PFD filter selection is correct. I would 
always favour an existing acroread over another filter, since Adobe 
is kind of de facto standard and should produce better output. 

Can we agree upon, that Acroread7 will be marked as broken if 
its still broken ?
